channel.title: 21-DAY Daniel Fast
channel.description: This 21-day journey can be started at any time of the year. Whenever you feel the call to reset, refocus, or draw closer to God, these days are here to guide you with Scripture, reflection, prayer, and simple daily practices. The structure comes from the example of Daniel, who set his heart to seek God for three weeks. These 21 days invite you into a rhythm of consistency and spiritual focus.
channel.author: Eric Kouassi
channel.summary: The Daniel Fast is a partial fast rooted in Scripture. It emphasizes simple, plant-based foods and a posture of humility before God.

episodes.title: Day 1: Setting Your Heart to Seek God | 21-Day Prayer & Fasting Journey (Daniel 10:2)
episodes.description: Welcome to Day 1 of our 21-Day Prayer & Fasting Journey, inspired by Daniel's season of seeking God! Today’s theme: Setting Your Heart to Seek God Scripture: Daniel 10:2 –

Reflection: Today marks the beginning of a 21-day journey of intention and openness. Daniel created space to hear God more clearly. You begin with the same simple yes. Follow the full 21-day devotional series here: 👉 https://seekgodwithdaniel.dailyaudio.cf
